_comment: Damage type effectiveness matrix and shield absorption baseline for the All Space combat MVP.

ballistic.description: Kinetic energy dissipates on shields, excellent armor penetration

energy_beam.description: Overloads shield emitters, reflected by armor

energy_pulse.description: Same as continuous beam - optimized for shield stripping

missile.description: Explosion blocked by shields, devastating to exposed hull

missile_dumb.description: Alias for missile — dumb rockets use the same damage profile

missile_guided.description: Alias for missile — guided missiles use the same damage profile

shield_absorption.description: Percentage of damage absorbed by active shields

hardpoint_hit_regions.description: MVP radial thresholds around each hardpoint world position; extra term scales with hardpoint_hp_max
